content.en:
"The problem of the Six-Winged Family has been solved!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Otherwise, facing the threat of a huge force all the time, he is really on pins and needles, maybe he will have to be the enemy of the six-winged family at any time, he can run as he pleases, but the human race can't run!

Now, the external crisis is gone, and he has to start the cultivation of the extradimensional realm.

Before he became a transcendent realm, Ye Tian didn't know much about the cultivation of the transcendent realm, and only knew that if he wanted to become the second realm, he had to comprehend the rules of the transcendent dimension, and if he wanted to become the third realm, he had to open up the transcendent realm in his body.

But he didn't know exactly how to break through.

Therefore, for now, we have to take a closer look at the cultivation of the transcendent realm.

And just to understand the cultivation knowledge of the transcendent realm, it is not difficult, and there is no need to pay too much price for "three zero three".

Six Thousand Territory, Extreme Yang Realm.

After Ye Tian appeared with the cultivation of the transcendent realm, he casually made friends with some extradimensional realms, communicated with these extradimensional realms, and even traded, and gradually learned a lot of cultivation knowledge of the transcendent realm from them.

These extra-dimensional realms are all extra-dimensional realms of the first realm, but they are also relatively familiar with the cultivation knowledge of the first and second transcendent realms.

The cultivation of the first realm is not complicated, and it is to improve the cultivation from the beginning.

At the beginning of the first realm, the middle stage of the first realm, the late stage of the first realm, and the peak of the first realm, after reaching the peak of the first realm, you need to comprehend the extradimensional rules, and only with the help of the superdimensional rules can you make the transcendent body of the first realm transform and reach the transcendent body of the second realm.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also learned a secret from those superdimensional realm powerhouses, that is, the secret of the perfect superdimensional Dao species.

In the Six Thousand Realm, the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Seed Inheritance is very precious, but it is not so precious.

The reason why I say this is that the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species involves the fourth realm, but the strongest in the Six Thousand Realm is only the second realm, so it has nothing to do with them.

However, there is still a glimmer of hope for a breakthrough in these extra-dimensional realms, so they still want to condense the perfect extra-dimensional Dao species.

"It's no wonder that the Sky Pavilion gave such a high price to the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species in the first place. "

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

According to the information currently available, if you want to impact the third realm of the extra-dimensional realm, you must open up the extra-dimensional realm, and the extra-dimensional realm is also related to the super-dimensional dao species.

If you don't impact the fourth realm, this slightest defect is nothing, but if you impact the fourth realm, this slightest defect is enough to kill.

Anyone who is not a powerhouse of the third realm of the imperfect transcendent realm dares to attack the fourth realm, it is certain death, and there has never been an exception.

"If there is no condensation of the perfect superdimensional Dao species when the peak realm god is impacting the half-step transcendent realm, the limit of the future is the third realm transcendent realm. However, for many extradimensional realms, they don't care at all, because most of their future limits are in the first realm, and the few who have the hope of reaching the second realm and the third realm are extremely rare, let alone the fourth realm. "

Therefore, from beginning to end, many forces do not care about the inheritance of the super-dimensional Dao species, and do not force the perfection of the super-dimensional Dao species.

But after Ye Tian knew this secret, he naturally wanted to leave more inheritance of the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species for the Terran race, so that the Terrans could give birth to more powerhouses who broke through to the half-step superdimensional realm with the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species.

......

Polar Yang Realm.

Yangdu City.

Ye Tian participated in a trade fair in the extra-dimensional realm, and there were about dozens of extra-dimensional realms in attendance, and this meeting was a meeting for trading and communicating with each other.

There will be such transactions often, after all, at the level of the extradimensional realm, it is extremely difficult to improve every step, maybe you can trade with each other to get the treasures you need.

At the trade fair, several extradimensional realms privately approached Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, a few of us are here to invite you to join our Retreat Alliance this time!"

The Mountain and Sea Realm Lord invited Ye Tian, "If you join our Escape Alliance, there will be many benefits, and there is even hope to enter the Five Thousand Realm." "

"Enter the Five Thousand Territory?" Ye Tian frowned, "Could it be that we can't enter the Five Thousand Territory now?"

The words of the Mountain and Sea Realm Lord shocked Ye Tian.

"Why is that?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Mountain and Sea Realm said: "It's very simple, the territory of the six thousand and the territory of the five thousand and above are all separated, and its boundary extradimensional barrier is unimaginably strong, even the extradimensional realm of the second realm cannot tear such a boundary extradimensional barrier. However, many powerful forces in the 5,000th Territory have joined forces to tear apart the border extradimensional barrier and build a permanent passage, but it is difficult to use this passage, and it is almost impossible to rank in the first transcendent realm. "

"Then why do you say that you have hope of letting me enter the territory of 5000?"

Ye Tian frowned.

The Mountain and Sea Realm Lord smiled: "Because we have mastered an area where the boundary extradimensional barrier is extremely weak, coupled with the joint formation of many extradimensional realms, and in a certain period, there is hope that the barrier will be torn apart, allowing us to leave the Six Thousand Territory and enter the other side. "

"We are only in the first realm, and we haven't even reached the extradimensional realm of the second realm, what can we do when we enter that side?" Ye Tian said.

"If you go over there, at least you can hope to get better treasures, at least in the Five Thousand Realm, and the hope of breaking through to the second realm is greater. "The Mountain and Sea Realm Lord still wants to persuade Ye Tian. 0.2 But Ye Tian shook his head.

He didn't want to leave the Six Thousand Realm for the time being, and he wasn't ready to leave until he stepped into the second realm.

If not, if you really offend the powerful forces in the territory of 5000, maybe the other party will even find the human race, and it will be dangerous.

So, he was not in a hurry to leave.

Moreover, unlike the other extradimensional realms of the first realm, he grew up quickly and did not need to take risks.

Seeing that Ye Tian refused, the face of the Mountain and Sea Realm Lord was a little unsightly.

"Lord Ye Tian Realm, if you regret it, you can still find us. We will not leave for three hundred extradimensional eras. If it's a little more late, we won't be able to accept the extradimensional realm!"

After speaking, these extradimensional realms have left.
